narration: Nearby stars shift as Earth moves—this shift reveals their distance.
visual_description: Hook visual: Nearby stars shift as Earth moves—this shift reveals their distance.

narration: This phenomenon is called stellar parallax. It's all about perspective.

narration: As Earth orbits the Sun, stars appear to slightly shift against the background.

narration: Using trigonometry, astronomers calculate distances based on this tiny shift.
